// hello world
Dzulkipli Amiruddin
Web Developer & Frontend Specialist

Experienced web developer with nearly a decade of experience across front-end and back-end development, specialising in responsive design, UI/UX, and website performance optimisation.

Skilled in WordPress, HTML, CSS, JavaScript and PHP, with a growing focus on AI-assisted development and Vibe Coding to accelerate build speed and efficiency.

Proven track record delivering high-quality client websites at MYSense Marketing and Fishermen Analytics — committed to building reliable, performant sites that uphold strong technical standards and on-time delivery.

Work history
Web Specialist
MYSense Marketing Sdn Bhd
Apr 2025 – Present
  • Build and maintain client websites on WordPress, Wix, Shopify and Unbounce, managing up to 3 simultaneous builds.
  • Convert design concepts into fully responsive websites across all devices.
  • Optimise for speed and SEO — maintaining Semrush scores 80–90% and PageSpeed 85%+.
  • Oversee 10+ concurrent projects spanning development, optimisation, and maintenance.
  • Conduct client training sessions and prepare handover documentation.
Web Developer
Fishermen Analytics Sdn Bhd
Nov 2017 – Mar 2025
  • Developed and maintained web applications for long-term clients over 7+ years.
  • Supported web testing and QA of new and updated applications before each release.
  • Identified and resolved application defects to maintain system stability.
  • Participated in regular client meetings providing technical insights.
Programmer
Imperia Asia International Sdn Bhd
Dec 2016 – Oct 2017
  • Maintained 2–3 internal systems and developed a dedicated HR management system.
  • Resolved IT-related issues and provided system support for internal users.
